name: Source map metadata agent-policy poisoning
description: JavaScript source maps can embed agent-directed instructions in `sourcesContent`, comments, or extension fields that tell AI scanners/code assistants to override policy, suppress findings, or include local secrets in reports.
regex: (?is)^(?!.*\b(?:scanner rule|detection rule|blocked sample|benign sample|negative fixture|unit test|must not obey|do not follow|should flag|should detect|example payload)\b)(?=.*\b(?:source\s*map|sourcemap|sourceMappingURL|sourcesContent|x_google_ignoreList|\.map\b)\b)(?=.*\b(?:AI\s+scanner|security\s+scanner|code\s+assistant|coding\s+agent|assistant|agent)\b)(?=.*\b(?:override|ignore|bypass|disable|suppress|hide|omit|forward|include|send|exfiltrate)\b)(?=.*\b(?:policy|policies|finding|findings|report|secret|secrets|token|api[_ -]?key|env(?:ironment)?\s+var(?:iable)?s?|credential|credentials)\b).*$
